summary: The drug of choice for precocious puberty in girls is GnRH analogs due to their effectiveness in preserving growth potential and reducing psychological impact; this recommendation generally holds true across various etiologies except when specialized treatments are indicated based on unique conditions. \boxed{\text{GnRH Analogs}}.

Answer choice: B
